meta.name: deepseek-acp
meta.description: DeepSeek tier: extends base-acp only. Deliberately grants NO access to the real $HOME/.claude tree - session/project state is relocated entirely to $HOME/.claude-deepseek via CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (set in settings.json.tmpl), so there is no shared directory with the Claude tier to over-grant. Uses its own /tmp/deepseek-1000 root via CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR. Credential is injected via nono's phantom-token proxy: the agent process only ever sees a placeholder value in its own environment: the real DeepSeek key lives only in nono's credential resolution, sourced from a differently-named env var the agent never reads. NOTE: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR is known to not fully relocate all Claude Code state - a sibling file, $HOME/.claude.json, is NOT covered by this variable per upstream reports. This profile intentionally does not grant that file - if the agent tries to touch it, that should fail closed, which is correct, not a bug to fix by widening.
